name: Bison
tooltip: :: <D>KINETIC RESISTANCE</>
> <C>25%</> increased explosive resistance
> <C>25%</> reduced aux power drain from all sources
> <C>25%</> reduced direct vitals damage received during maneuvers and while using backup weapons
<B>> Inactive while aux power below</> <C>50%</>
:: <D>SURVIVAL INSTINCT</>
> <C>50%</> increased Snare resistance, Snare immunity while Core active
> While below <C>25%</> defense: <C>25%</> reduced aux power drain from all sources, <C>25%</> increased acceleration and gain an additional aerial maneuver charge
> While below <C>50%</> vitals: <C>25%</> increased defense regeneration and vitals restored from all sources
<B>> Can be Disabled</>
:: <D>CORE OVERDRIVE</>
> <C>25%</> increased Core generation
> <C>25%</> increased dexterity and unaffected by loadout or movement speed penalties while Core active
> <C>0-25%</> Reduced Core activation cost scaling proportionally with remaining vitals from <C>100-50%</>

spec.body: 50% increased weapon accuracy and 25% increased speed and dexterity for 5 s on receiving direct vitals damage, 10 s cooldown
spec.tech: Core activates without cost for 2.5 s on performing a wall dive or flip within 1 s of starting a climb, 15 s cooldown
spec.hardware: Melee and firearm damage gains 0-50% defense bypass proportional to remaining vitals, from 100-25%

name: Hydra
tooltip: :: <D>ADRENAL FEEDBACK</>
> <C>5%</> increased speed, dexterity, weapon accuracy and melee damage on killing an enemy during maneuvers or within <C>4 m</>, stacking up to <C>5</> times

> <C>25%</> of visible damage dealt during maneuvers restored to vitals, increased by <C>5%</> for each Adrenal Feedback stack, non-maneuver backup weapon damage dealt within <C>4m</> restored to vitals with <C>50%</> effectiveness

> Neuro-link 'Parasite' on Core activation: Deals <C>5</> vitals damage every <C>0.5 s</> to up to <C>6</> visible or detected enemies, <C>200%</> of damage dealt restored to vitals and max vitals, increased by <C>10%</> for each Adrenal Feedback stack on activation
<B>> Core activation resets Adrenal Feedback stacks</>
<B>> Can be Disabled</>
:: <D>REGENETICS</>
> <C>5 /s</> additional vitals regeneration, increased by <C>0.5 /s</> for each Adrenal Feedback stack
> <C>25%</> of combined direct head and limb vitals damage received restored after <C>2 s</> of last direct damage, increased by <C>5%</> for each Adrenal Feedback stack
> Defense regeneration restores max defense while Core is active
<B>></> <C>10%</> <B>increased debuff duration and Bleed damage received for each Adrenal Feedback stack</>
<B>></> <C>5%</> <B>reduced defense regeneration for each Adrenal Feedback stack</>
:: <D>ADAPTIVE RECOVERY</>
> Vitals restored by Adrenal Feedback, Regenetics and Adaptive Recovery increases and restores max vitals up to <C>200</> vitals
> <C>50</> vitals restored on Core activation, <C>10 s</> cooldown
> <C>25</> vitals restored on defense depletion, <C>10 s</> cooldown

spec.body: Gain an Adrenal Feedback stack every 20 s, increases maximum stacks by 5
spec.tech: All visible kills while Core active gain an Adrenal Feedback stack.  Reaching 5 stacks fully restores defense and Core charge
spec.hardware: Gain enhanced vision and firearms and backup weapons bypass all damage reductions for 5 s on kill, duration extended while dealing damage, 10 s cooldown

name: Ghost
tooltip: :: <D>TACTICAL CAMOUFLAGE</>
> Reduces visibility, undetectable by proximity devices and targeting systems, <C>2 s</> cooldown
> <C>25%</> reduced loadout speed penalty and tag duration while active
> Deep Camouflage: Activates <C>2 s</> after being stationary or crouched, <C>50%</> reduced visibility and undetectable by targeting optics
<B>></> <C>2 s</> <B>Disable+ on taking direct damage while Deep Camouflage active</>
<B>></> <C>50%</> <B>defense regeneration, damage received bypasses defense while active</>
<B>> Deactivates on interactions, offensive actions and Burning</>
<B>> Can be Disabled</>
:: <D>HEIGHTENED PROFICIENCY</>
> Opportunity: Active for <C>2 s</> after camouflage deactivation, firearm and backup weapon damage bypass all damage reductions, <C>25%</> increased ground and climb speed, <C>10 s</> cooldown
> Visible kills reduce Opportunity cooldown by <C>2 s</>, fully reset cooldown while Opportunity is active
> <C>25%</> increased firearm accuracy, dexterity and melee damage for <C>5 s</> on visible kill
:: <D>DISRUPTIVE MEASURES</>
> <C>25%</> reduced detectable range and scrambled radar profile while moving with camouflage active

> Surge AOE on camouflage deactivate: Disable enemies and enemy devices within <C>3 m</> for <C>2 s</>, Shroud on camouflage activate: undetectable by all equipment for <C>2 s</> per visible enemy killed while camouflage inactive

> Neuro-link 'Spike' on Core activation: Deals <C>25</> vital damage, <C>4 s</> Disable and Snare to up to <C>6</> visible or detected enemies, executes if target below <C>25%</> vitals, destroys visible or detected devices, <C>10 s</> cooldown

spec.body: Gain 25 temporary defense during Opportunity, clear Burn on camouflage activation, 50% reduced explosive damage received while camouflage active
spec.tech: Interacting and throwing devices no longer deactivates camouflage. Deep camouflage no longer stuns on taking damage, gains enhanced vision and undetectable while active
spec.hardware: Hip firing supressed firearms and attacking with backup weapons no longer deactivates camouflage

name: Dragon
tooltip: :: <D>DRIFTER JUMP-PACK</>

> Hover: Can be activated while in air, <C>8 m/s</> hover speed up to <C>12 m/s</> while boosting, unaffected by loadout speed penalties, <C>50%</> reduced movement speed penalties, body impacts while boosting can knockback, recover an aerial maneuver charge on activation, Ignites surrounding area for <C>3 s</> on death if active, <C>4 s</> cooldown
> Enhanced Dodge, Dive and climbing, Air Dive replaced with Air Dash: Launch rapidly in movement direction, can knockback and knockdown

> Ground Slam maneuver: Launch downward to ground while above <C>5 m</>, deals <C>50-25</> explosive and Burn damage damage within <C>2-4 m</>, enemies within <C>2 m</> can be knocked down, <C>10 s</> cooldown
<B>> Deactivates if aux power fully depleted or Ground Slam impacts</>
<B>>  </><C>50%</> <B>reduced aux regeneration while hovering, boosting drains aux power</>
<B>> Can be Disabled</>
:: <D>SCORCH HAZARD</>
> Backdraft AOE on drifter pack activation while enemies in proximity or body impact while boosting: Ignites enemies within <C>3 m</> for <C>25</> Burn damage, <C>5 s</> cooldown
> Backup weapons deal an additional <C>25%</> of damage dealt as Burn damage
> Neuro-link 'Combust' on Core activation: Deals <C>25</> Burn damage and Burn+ to up to <C>6</> visible or detected enemies, damage increased by <C>25%</> per addtional enemy, <C>10 s</> cooldown
<B>> Can be Disabled</>
:: <D>THERMAL NANO-MESH</>
> <C>50%</> increased Burn resistance, Burn stat reduction immunity and <C>25%</> defense restored per enemy hit by Backdraft
> <C>0-50%</> increased explosive resistance while hovering, scaling proportionally with speed from <C>0-12 m/s</>
> <C>0-50%</> increased defense regeneration and no regeneration delay while hovering or during maneuvers, scaling proportionally with speed from <C>0-12 m/s</>

spec.body: 50% of defense gained from Backdraft or Burn and explosive damage received is restored to vitals
spec.tech: Backdraft and Ground Slam gain 25% increased damage and range. Backdraft, Ground Slam and backup weapon damage applies Burn+
spec.hardware: Aerial maneuvers and hover no longer drain aux power or consume charges for 5 s on receiving chemical heal

name: Rhino
tooltip: :: <D>RESILIENT MOMENTUM</>
> Knockdown immunity while defence not depleted, <C>50%</> reduced movement speed penalties while defence above <C>50%</>
> <C>25%</> knockback resistance, <C>50%</> reduced fall damage
> Bolster while Core active: Bleed and knockdown immunity, <C>0 s</> defense regen delay, <C>40 /s</> defense regeneration
<B>></> <C>50%</> <B>reduced vitals restored from all sources while Core active</>
:: <D>CONCUSSIVE IMPULSE</>

> Shockwave AOE on body impact or landing from <C>5 m</> with enemies in proximity: Deals <C>50-25</> shock damage and <C>2 s</> Disable and Snare to enemies within <C>3 m</>, can knockdown on shoulder barge impact, <C>10 s</> cooldown
> <C>50%</> of damage dealt by Shockwave restored to defense and max defense
> <C>25%</> of direct damage received within <C>3 m</> reflected as shock damage and <C>0.5 s</>, while defence not depleted and not on cooldown
<B>> Can be Disabled</>
:: <D>REACTIVE CLADDING</>
<C>100%</> of combined vitals damage received restored to defense during defense regeneration on exceeding <C>25</> total damage, <C>10 s</> cooldown
> <C>25-0%</> reduced direct defense damage received, scaling proportionally with speed from <C>0-8 m/s</>, while not on cooldown
> <C>50%</> increased explosive resistance
<B>></> <C>50%</> <B>increased Disable duration</>

spec.body: 40 /s defense and aux power regeneration while Disabled. Gain Overcharge during active Core if activated while Disabled or Overcharged
spec.tech: Shockwave gains 50% increased range, debuff duration and knockback force, applies Disable+ and Snare+
spec.hardware: Backup weapon damage applies Disable for 2 s and deals 0-25% additional shock damage proportional to remaining defense, from 0-50%. Overcharge for 2 s on dealing melee or body impact damage
